name: 6"x9" Drawer Flatware Organizer - Brightroom™: Clear PETG In-Drawer Storage Tray, Contemporary Kitchen Organizer
description:
The 6-Inch x 9-Inch Drawer Flatware Organizer from Brightroom™ will help you keep your kitchen tidy. Made of see-through plastic, this flatware organizer is 2.6 inches high, 6 inches wide, and 9 inches deep. Place it conveniently in your drawer to store and access kitchen tools, such as your lemon juicer, can opener and more.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
